sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73621" key="o(moia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμοι-άζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὅμοιος</etym>) <sense id="n73621.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be like,</tr_> interpol. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg002.perseus-grc1:14:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Marc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.70</biblScope></bibl>, v.l.in<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:23:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Matt.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.27</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n73621.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> trans., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compare, liken,</tr_> Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.365K" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.365K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
